title: quercus utilis
intro: Quercus utilis, also known as the Chinese evergreen oak or Chinese corkbark, is a species of evergreen tree native to China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds that help to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The health benefits of Quercus utilis include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Quercus utilis is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, decoctions, and infusions, and can also be dried and used as a powder or extract to make capsules or tablets.
